name: Investview, Inc.
summary: Investview, Inc. is a Nevada-based diversified company operating several business units: a direct-to-consumer (DTC) marketing platform via subsidiary Conectiv, LLC offering financial education tools, software, and health/wellness products through independent distributors; a proprietary over-the-counter aesthetics, health, nutrition, and cognitive wellness products division; an early-stage online retail brokerage platform; and a bitcoin mining operation focused on sustainable blockchain business.
